method: Nebius' unauthenticated structured catalog API https://tokenfactory.nebius.com/api/public/models_info (cross-checked against its Markdown view at /api/public/models_info.md). Parsed flavors[].input_price_per_million_tokens / output_price_per_million_tokens and flavors[].regions. The 2026-07-22 catalog has 26 public models (all status:active); embedding-only Qwen3-Embedding-8B ($0.01/1M input, no text output price) is omitted, leaving 25 text/vision models. region:'eu' is used only for eu-north1; us-central1 is 'us' and uk-south1 is 'uk'. No models added or removed vs 2026-07-12 and all prices unchanged; only change: GLM-5.2 now serves from uk-south1 (was us-central1), re-flagged region 'uk'. All prices are native USD (no EUR conversion needed).
